stories.headline: A$AP Rocky Shouts Out Son Riot Onstage as Rihanna Watches in Crowd - TMZ
stories.summary: Rihanna made a rare appearance in Los Angeles Saturday night, stepping out with her son Riot Rose Mayers to support A$AP Rocky during his "Don’t Be Dumb" tour stop at Kia Forum.

stories.headline: 'Supergirl' Stumbles in Box Office Debut, 'Toy Story 5' Remains No. 1 - Variety
stories.summary: "Supergirl" struggled to take flight at the box office, while "Toy Story 5" ruled again.

stories.headline: 'Love Island' Star Alannah Keyser Speaks Out After Sudden Removal From Show - TMZ
stories.summary: "Love Island USA" contestant Alannah Keyser is speaking out after being removed from the Peacock dating series following resurfaced footage and social media posts that sparked major backlash online.

stories.headline: Michelle Pfeiffer reveals why she felt ‘humiliated’ auditioning for her breakthrough film role - Page Six
stories.summary: The legendary actress found her breakthrough role in the 1982 film.

stories.headline: George Strait joins Alan Jackson in rare appearance at farewell show - USA Today
stories.summary: Alan Jackson ended his country touring career in Nashville with a surprise appearance by friend George Strait, who himself has retired from the road.
